title: WOS Agent Config
description: A WOS Agent Config sidecar document. Provides detailed operational configuration for an agent declared in a WOS AI Integration Document -- endpoint configuration, credential references, approved model version lists, calibration requirements, autonomy escalation and demotion policies, and per-action overrides. Operational parameters can be updated independently of the governance document.

^x-.$comment: Vendor extensions per Kernel spec §10.6 (extensions escape hatch)

$wosAgentConfig.description: WOS Agent Config specification version. MUST be '1.0'.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for WOS Agent Config sidecar

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

targetAgent.description: Agent identifier within the AI Integration Document this config targets.

x-lm.intent: Binds this sidecar to a specific agent declaration

targetIntegration.description: URI of the AI Integration Document, if not co-located.

version.description: Version of this Agent Config document.

title.description: Human-readable name for this agent configuration.

approvedVersions.description: Approved model version list for 'approved' model version policy.

calibration.description: Calibration requirements and schedule. When calibration has expired, effective autonomy is capped at assistive.

autonomyPolicy.description: Dynamic autonomy escalation and demotion rules.

extensions.description: Extension data. All keys MUST be prefixed with 'x-'.

timeout.description: Maximum invocation time as ISO 8601 duration.

healthCheckUrl.description: Health check endpoint for availability monitoring.

required.description: Whether calibration is required for this agent.

frequency.description: Re-calibration frequency as ISO 8601 duration. Required when 'required' is true.

minimumSamples.description: Minimum reviewed outputs for valid calibration.

escalation.description: Conditions under which autonomy may be elevated.

demotion.description: Conditions under which autonomy is automatically reduced.

maxAutonomy.description: Maximum autonomy level this agent may reach.

condition.description: FEL expression evaluated against agent operational state and case data.

targetLevel.description: Autonomy level to escalate to when condition is met.

escalationExpiry.description: ISO 8601 duration after which the escalation expires and the agent reverts to its prior autonomy level (AI Integration S5.4).

condition.description: FEL expression evaluated against agent operational state and case data.

targetLevel.description: Autonomy level to demote to when condition is met.

pendingRecalibration.description: When true, agent operates at demoted level until recalibration meets escalation conditions.

actionRef.description: Reference to the action in the kernel lifecycle.

autonomy.description: Override autonomy level for this action.

reviewWindow.description: Override review window for supervisory actions (ISO 8601 duration).

confidenceFloor.description: Override confidence floor for this action.
